events.title: US and Iran Trade Strikes After Tankers Hit in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military reported striking missile sites and command centers in Iran, while Iran claimed to have attacked US bases. This exchange follows recent attacks on oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions between the two nations.

events.title: Trump Threatens More Strikes on Iran as Tehran Warns of 'Fearless' Response
events.desc: At a NATO summit, President Trump stated the US would "probably" strike Iran again, though he suggested any further action would be brief. Iran, in turn, issued a warning of a 'fearless' response to any new attacks.

events.title: US Issues Fresh Iran-Related Sanctions as Conflict Flares
events.desc: The U.S. Treasury Department announced new sanctions targeting Ali Ansari, an Iranian banker and businessman based in Dubai, along with 13 other individuals and entities. These sanctions follow Iran's resumption of attacks on oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Trump Says US, Iran Agree to Continue Talks but Ceasefire Over
events.desc: President Donald Trump announced that the U.S. and Iran have agreed to continue negotiations, but declared the ceasefire established last month to be over. This statement follows recent escalations and renewed hostilities.

events.title: Trump Threatens Iran After Chants for His Death Erupted at Khamenei Funeral
events.desc: US President Donald Trump issued a warning to Iran, stating the US would 'decimate' the country in response to alleged assassination plots and chants for his death at Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral. This escalates rhetoric amid ongoing tensions.

events.title: Russia Hits Kyiv with Ballistic Missiles and Drones, Wounding 11
events.desc: In a significant escalation, Russia launched ballistic missiles and 121 drones targeting Kyiv. The attacks injured at least 11 people, marking one of the deadliest months in the ongoing conflict.

events.title: Big Fall in Oil, Gas, and Cargo Ships Taking US-Backed Hormuz Route After New Strikes
events.desc: Data indicates a substantial decline in maritime traffic, including oil, gas, and cargo ships, utilizing the Strait of Hormuz. This reduction follows a series of recent attacks in the strategically vital waterway.

events.title: Bomb Explosions Injure 18 in Damascus During Macron's Visit
events.desc: Multiple bomb explosions occurred in Damascus, injuring 18 people. The blasts took place as French President Macron was reportedly welcomed at the presidential palace by Syrian President Bashar al-Assad, raising concerns about security.

events.title: Headteacher Among Four Killed in Deadliest Israeli Attack on Lebanon Since Latest Ceasefire
events.desc: An Israeli strike in Lebanon resulted in the deaths of four individuals, including a headteacher. This incident is reported as the deadliest attack on Lebanon since the most recent ceasefire was established, violating the terms of de-escalation.

events.title: Palestinians Mourn Gaza World Cup Screenings Organiser Killed in Israeli Strike
events.desc: Mohammed al-Wahidi, an aid worker known for organizing World Cup screenings in Gaza, was killed in an Israeli strike. He had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the ongoing conflict.

events.title: Houthi Threat to Maritime Shipping Remains a Concern
events.desc: While attention has shifted to the Strait of Hormuz, the Houthi threat to maritime shipping in other regions continues to be a significant concern. Past analyses suggested the international response has been inadequate.

events.title: Cuba Suffers Second Nationwide Blackout in Five Days
events.desc: Cuba experienced its second nationwide power outage in just five days, raising concerns about the stability of its energy infrastructure. The cause of the repeated blackouts remains under investigation.

events.title: Meta Backtracks on AI-Image Feature Due to Privacy Backlash
events.desc: Meta has retracted its 'Muse Image' AI feature for Instagram following widespread criticism over privacy concerns and user consent. The decision highlights the ongoing challenges in deploying AI technologies responsibly.
